results.description: index.ts exports schemaTypes array
index.ts imports vehicle schema
index.ts imports pageSchemas
index.ts imports homepage components (homepageHero, banner, page, promotion)
index.ts imports content schemas (blogPost, testimonial, faqEntry, protectionPlan)
index.ts imports settings (siteSettings, seoSettings, navigation)
index.ts imports inventorySettings
index.ts imports supabaseVehicleReference
index.ts spreads pageSchemas into schemaTypes
index.ts uses defineType/defineField pattern (via sanity imports in sub-files)
vehicle schema has name: "vehicle"
vehicle schema has required year field with min/max validation
vehicle schema has required make field
vehicle schema has required model field
vehicle schema has VIN field with length(17) validation
vehicle schema has status field with radio layout and 5 options
vehicle schema has condition field (new/used/certified)
vehicle schema has EV-specific fields (evRange, batteryCapacity)
vehicle schema has images array with hotspot and alt/caption fields
vehicle schema has slug with auto-source from year/make/model/stockNumber
lender.ts has name: "lender" document type
lender schema has required name field
lender schema has promoRate with min(0).max(30) validation
lender schema has minCreditScore with min(300).max(850) validation
lender schema has maxLoanTerm with min(12).max(120) validation
lender schema has isActive boolean with initialValue: true
lender schema has orderings (rateAsc, sortOrderAsc, nameAsc)
lender schema has slug field with source: name
blogPost schema has required title field
blogPost schema has slug with source: title
blogPost schema has body as array of block and image
blogPost schema has coverImage with hotspot
blogPost preview shows published/draft status with emoji
testimonial schema has required name field
testimonial schema has rating with min(1).max(5) validation
testimonial schema has source field with 4 options (google/facebook/direct/dealerrater)
faqEntry schema has required question field
faqEntry schema has category with 5 options (general/financing/trade-in/delivery/warranty)
protectionPlan schema has required title field
protectionPlan schema has highlights array with icon/label fields
pages.ts exports pageSchemas array with 13 schemas
trustBadge object type has icon/text/title/label/description/value fields
ctaButton object type has label/url/text/style fields
homepage schema has heroSection with headline/subheadline/primaryCta/secondaryCta
homepage schema has featuredVehicles array with max(6).unique() validation
homepage schema has promoBanner with enabled/showBanner/text fields
financingPage schema has calculator with defaultVehiclePrice/defaultDownPayment/defaultTerm
financingPage schema has processSteps array
sellYourCarPage schema has comparisonTable with rows/headers
sellYourCarPage schema has avilooBattery section
aiSettings schema has annaAssistant with enabled/displayName/welcomeMessage
aiSettings schema has priceNegotiator with negotiationRules
vdpSettings schema has 210-point inspection with categories array
deliverySettings schema has deliveryTiers array with minKm/maxKm/cost
calculatorSettings schema has creditTiers array with label/minScore/apr
siteSettings has 7 field groups (dealer/contact/hours/financing/delivery/social/footer)
siteSettings has address object with street/city/province/postalCode/country
siteSettings has businessHours array with day/open/close/isClosed fields
siteSettings has financing object with minDownPayment/maxTerm/defaultRate
siteSettings has delivery object with freeDeliveryRadius/perKmRate/enabled
siteSettings has socialLinks with facebook/instagram/twitter/youtube/tiktok
siteSettings has leadRouting with salesEmail/financeEmail/tradeInEmail
siteSettings has aggregateRating for SEO with ratingValue/reviewCount
navigation schema has mainNavigation array with navItem/label/url/children
navigation schema has headerCta with showCta/buttonLabel/buttonUrl/buttonStyle
navigation schema has footerLinkColumns array with title/links
seoSettings has pagePath with required validation
seoSettings has title with max(60) and description with max(160) validation
homepageHero schema has required name and headline fields
homepageHero has overlayOpacity with min(0).max(1) validation
homepageHero has backgroundImage with hotspot and backgroundVideo url
banner schema has position field with 4 options (top/homepage/inventory/footer)
banner schema has startDate and endDate datetime fields
page schema has required title and slug fields
page schema has content as array of block and image with alt/caption
promotion schema has discountType with 4 options (percentage/amount/financing/addon)
inventorySettings has title field with initialValue "Our Inventory"
inventorySettings has showFiltersSidebar boolean with initialValue: true
inventorySettings has itemsPerPage with min(6).max(48) validation
inventorySettings has defaultSortOrder with 5 options
inventorySettings has filterOptions object with 10 boolean toggles
inventorySettings has creditTiers array with 4 default tiers (Excellent/Good/Fair/Subprime)
inventorySettings has priceDisplay with showBiWeeklyPayment/showMonthlyPayment
inventorySettings has taxRate with min(0).max(15) validation
structure.ts exports structure function
structure has Inventory section with vehicle document list
structure has By Status sub-navigation (available/in-transit/reserved/sold)
structure has Financing section with lender list and financingPage singleton
structure has Delivery section pointing to deliverySettings singleton
structure has Pages section with homepage/sellYourCarPage singletons
structure has Content section with blogPost/testimonial/faqEntry/protectionPlan
structure has Settings section with siteSettings/navigation/aiSettings/vdpSettings
vehicle references lender schema via specialFinance field
navigation references trustBadge type (defined in pages.ts)
homepage references supabaseVehicleReference type for featuredVehicles
lender schema is NOT duplicated in pages.ts (pages.ts lender is a simplified version)
all document schemas use defineType from sanity
all document schemas use defineField from sanity
no schema file uses bare window (should use globalThis.window)
structure.ts uses StructureBuilder type import from sanity/structure
